description: React.js rules from reactjs_rules.md and common_rules.md

rules.name: no_class_components
rules.description: Class components are deprecated — use functional components with hooks
rules.message: Class component detected. Convert to a functional component with React hooks.
rules.fix_suggestion: Rewrite as: const MyComponent = () => { ... } and use useState/useEffect instead of lifecycle methods.

rules.name: no_raw_anchor_internal_nav
rules.description: Use <Link> from react-router-dom for internal navigation, not raw <a>
rules.message: Raw <a> tag used for internal navigation. Use <Link to="..."> from react-router-dom.
rules.fix_suggestion: import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; then use <Link to="/path">text</Link>.

rules.name: no_inline_styles
rules.description: Inline style objects are hard to maintain and override — use CSS Modules or styled-components
rules.message: Inline style object found. Use CSS Modules (Component.module.css) or styled-components.
rules.fix_suggestion: Extract to a CSS module: import styles from './Component.module.css'; style={styles.container}.

rules.name: no_jwt_in_localstorage
rules.description: JWTs stored in localStorage are vulnerable to XSS attacks
rules.message: JWT/token stored in localStorage/sessionStorage — XSS vulnerability. Use HttpOnly cookies.
rules.fix_suggestion: Store tokens in HttpOnly cookies set by the server. Implement token refresh via a secure endpoint.

rules.name: use_error_boundaries
rules.description: Top-level renders should be wrapped in an ErrorBoundary
rules.message: Root render not wrapped in an ErrorBoundary. Add one to prevent full-app crashes.

rules.name: no_global_css_modification
rules.description: Do not modify global CSS files from feature components
rules.message: Global CSS import detected in component. Use scoped CSS Modules or component-level styles.
rules.fix_suggestion: Create Component.module.css and import styles from './Component.module.css'.

rules.name: lazy_load_heavy_components
rules.description: Heavy components should be lazy-loaded with React.lazy and Suspense
rules.message: Heavy component imported statically. Consider lazy loading: const X = React.lazy(() => import('./X')).
rules.fix_suggestion: Use React.lazy(() => import('./HeavyComponent')) with a <Suspense fallback> wrapper.

rules.name: constants_not_hardcoded
rules.description: String constants and route names should live in a constants file
rules.message: Hardcoded route string in navigation call. Define routes in a constants/routes file.
rules.fix_suggestion: Import ROUTES from 'constants/routes' and use ROUTES.HOME instead of '/home'.
